00020 
00021 #ifndef PREVERIFIER_WRAPPERS_H
00022 #   define PREVERIFIER_WRAPPERS_H (1)
00023 
00024 #if HAVE_CONFIG_H
00025 #   include <config.h>
00026 #endif // HAVE_CONFIG_H
00027 
00028 /* Adapt the NDEBUG macro to the convention used by the autotools of defining
00029  * all existing macros to 1 in order to simplify checking */
00030 
00031 #ifdef NDEBUG
00032 #   undef NDEBUG
00033 #   define NDEBUG (1)
00034 #endif // NDEBUG
00035 
00036 #include <assert.h>
00037 #include <ctype.h>
00038 #include <errno.h>
00039 #include <limits.h>
00040 #include <locale.h>
00041 #include <setjmp.h>
00042 #include <stdarg.h>
00043 #include <stddef.h>
00044 #include <stdio.h>
00045 #include <stdlib.h>
00046 #include <string.h>
00047 
00048 #if HAVE_INTTYPES_H
00049 #   include <inttypes.h>
00050 #endif // HAVE_INTTYPES_H
00051 
00052 /* Boolean type wrapper */
00053 
00069 #if HAVE_STDBOOL_H
00070 #   include <stdbool.h>
00071 #else
00072 #   if !HAVE__BOOL
00073 #       ifdef __cplusplus
00074 typedef bool _Bool;
00075 #       else
00076 typedef unsigned int _Bool;
00077 #       endif // __cplusplus
00078 #   endif // !HAVE_BOOL
00079 #   define bool _Bool
00080 #   define false (0)
00081 #   define true (1)
00082 #   define __bool_true_false_are_defined (1)
00083 #endif // HAVE_STDBOOL_H
00084 
00085 #if !HAVE_PTRDIFF_T
00086 
00089 typedef intptr_t ptrdiff_t;
00090 #endif // !HAVE_PTRDIFF_T
00091 
00092 // Time support
00093 
00094 #if TIME_WITH_SYS_TIME
00095 #   include <sys/time.h>
00096 #   include <time.h>
00097 #else
00098 #   if HAVE_SYS_TIME_H
00099 #       include <sys/time.h>
00100 #   else
00101 #       include <time.h>
00102 #   endif
00103 #endif
00104 
00105 #if HAVE_DIRENT_H
00106 #   include <dirent.h>
00107 #endif // HAVE_DIRENT_H
00108 
00109 #if HAVE_FCNTL_H
00110 #   include <fcntl.h>
00111 #endif // HAVE_FCNTL_H
00112 
00113 #if HAVE_UNISTD_H
00114 #   include <unistd.h>
00115 #endif // HAVE_UNISTD_H
00116 
00117 #if HAVE_SYS_TYPES_H
00118 #   include <sys/types.h>
00119 #endif // HAVE_SYS_TYPES_H
00120 
00121 #if HAVE_SYS_STAT_H
00122 #   include <sys/stat.h>
00123 #endif // HAVE_SYS_STAT_H
00124 
00125 #if HAVE_LANGINFO_H
00126 #   include <langinfo.h>
00127 #endif // HAVE_LANGINFO_H
00128 
00129 #if HAVE_ICONV_H
00130 #   include <iconv.h>
00131 #endif // HAVE_ICONV_H
00132 
00133 #if HAVE_ARPA_INET_H
00134 #   include <arpa/inet.h>
00135 #endif // HAVE_ARPA_INET_H
00136 
00137 #endif // !PREVERIFIER_WRAPPERS_H
Generated on Mon Mar 14 2016 15:25:27 for @PACKAGE_NAME@ by  1.7.1
